summary: Made surgical seam edits to keep Day 13 continuity consistent: the opening now enters through a distinct physical detail instead of repeating the neighboring time-count scaffold, Marcus's corrected vent-route knowledge stays with Noor, survivor-count references now resolve cleanly to six by sundown, and the ending hands off to Chapter 16 without repeating the same floor-terminal posture.
edits: Shifted the opening from a temporal breakfast lead-in to the tactile cafeteria-table detail while preserving the same morning setup and tone.
Removed the extra unnamed-survivor references so the Day 13 body count and six-person sundown state stay aligned.
Revised Marcus's aftermath so Noor does not pass the boiler-panel and return-route correction to Jae-won or Priya.
Trimmed the closing movement so it ends on Ember's thanks and the one-day countdown rather than duplicating Chapter 16's opening image.
